reasoning: Extensive searches show Vaishali gained 21.4 Elo from the FIDE Grand Swiss in September 2025, which raised her rating to the October 1 baseline of 2473. To increase her rating by another 1% (+24.7 points) to ~2498, she would require another exceptional tournament performance. We found no evidence of her playing in major events in October 2025, so her November FIDE rating will almost certainly remain close to 2473. The empirical base rate for a 1% Elo increase in a short timeframe is very low (0.007). Given she would need another massive Elo jump on top of her recent one, the probability is near zero. I am placing the probabilities at the minimum lower bound specified by the prompt rules (0.05) and increasing them slightly over time to reflect increased variance for further dates.
